etimesWho is Pierre Omidyar? The richest man of Iranian descent who built eBay from a broken laser pointer?Pierre Omidyar, the Iranian-born founder of eBay, quietly revolutionized online commerce. Driven by a passion for technology from a young age, he launched AuctionWeb in 1995, which quickly grew into the global e-commerce giant eBay. Omidyar's innovation and entrepreneurial spirit have made him one of the wealthiest individuals of Iranian descent.

etimesWhy the Oscar statuette is officially worth just $1: The surprising rule explainedWinning an Oscar is a prestigious achievement, but the golden trophy itself is officially valued at only $1. The Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences implemented a rule in 1951 requiring winners or their heirs to offer the statuette back to the Academy for $1 before selling it, preserving its symbolic value.
